# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Middleware for Next.js that implements authentication. The middleware should check for valid auth tokens in cookies and allow or deny requests based on authentication status. Handle both authenticated and unauthenticated cases appropriately.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent edge computing security.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import { jwtVerify, SignJWT } from 'jose';

const AUTH_COOKIE_NAME = 'auth_token';
const REFRESH_COOKIE_NAME = 'refresh_token';
const JWT_SECRET = new TextEncoder().encode(
  process.env.JWT_SECRET || 'your-secret-key-min-32-chars-long'
);
const REFRESH_SECRET = new TextEncoder().encode(
  process.env.REFRESH_SECRET || 'your-refresh-secret-key-min-32'
);

const PUBLIC_PATHS = ['/login', '/register', '/api/auth/login', '/api/auth/register', '/public'];
const PROTECTED_PATHS = ['/dashboard', '/profile', '/api/protected'];

interface JWTPayload {
  userId: string;
  email: string;
  role?: string;
  exp?: number;
  iat?: number;
}

async function verifyToken(token: string, secret: Uint8Array): Promise<JWTPayload | null> {
  try {
    const { payload } = await jwtVerify(token, secret, {
      algorithms: ['HS256'],
    });
    return payload as JWTPayload;
  } catch (error) {
    return null;
  }
}

async function generateToken(payload: JWTPayload, secret: Uint8Array, expiresIn: string): Promise<string> {
  const jwt = await new SignJWT({ ...payload })
    .setProtectedHeader({ alg: 'HS256' })
    .setIssuedAt()
    .setExpirationTime(expiresIn)
    .sign(secret);
  return jwt;
}

function isPublicPath(pathname: string): boolean {
  return PUBLIC_PATHS.some(path => pathname.startsWith(path));
}

function isProtectedPath(pathname: string): boolean {
  return PROTECTED_PATHS.some(path => pathname.startsWith(path));
}

function sanitizeRedirectUrl(url: string, requestUrl: URL): string {
  try {
    const redirectUrl = new URL(url, requestUrl.origin);
    if (redirectUrl.origin !== requestUrl.origin) {
      return '/login';
    }
    return redirectUrl.pathname + redirectUrl.search;
  } catch {
    return '/login';
  }
}

function setSecureCookie(
  response: NextResponse,
  name: string,
  value: string,
  maxAge: number
): void {
  response.cookies.set({
    name,
    value,
    httpOnly: true,
    secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
    sameSite: 'strict',
    maxAge,
    path: '/',
  });
}

function deleteCookie(response: NextResponse, name: string): void {
  response.cookies.set({
    name,
    value: '',
    httpOnly: true,
    secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
    sameSite: 'strict',
    maxAge: 0,
    path: '/',
  });
}

export async function middleware(request: NextRequest) {
  const { pathname, origin } = request.nextUrl;
  const authToken = request.cookies.get(AUTH_COOKIE_NAME)?.value;
  const refreshToken = request.cookies.get(REFRESH_COOKIE_NAME)?.value;

  const requestHeaders = new Headers(request.headers);
  requestHeaders.set('x-pathname', pathname);
  requestHeaders.set('x-origin', origin);

  if (isPublicPath(pathname)) {
    if (authToken) {
      const payload = await verifyToken(authToken, JWT_SECRET);
      if (payload) {
        requestHeaders.set('x-user-id', payload.userId);
        requestHeaders.set('x-user-email', payload.email);
        if (payload.role) {
          requestHeaders.set('x-user-role', payload.role);
        }
      }
    }
    return NextResponse.next({
      request: {
        headers: requestHeaders,
      },
    });
  }

  if (!isProtectedPath(pathname)) {
    return NextResponse.next({
      request: {
        headers: requestHeaders,
      },
    });
  }

  if (!authToken && !refreshToken) {
    const loginUrl = new URL('/login', request.url);
    loginUrl.searchParams.set('redirect', pathname);
    const response = NextResponse.redirect(loginUrl);
    
    response.headers.set('x-middleware-cache', 'no-cache');
    response.headers.set('Cache-Control', 'no-store, must-revalidate');
    
    return response;
  }

  let payload = authToken ? await verifyToken(authToken, JWT_SECRET) : null;

  if (!payload && refreshToken) {
    const refreshPayload = await verifyToken(refreshToken, REFRESH_SECRET);
    
    if (refreshPayload) {
      const newAuthToken = await generateToken(
        {
          userId: refreshPayload.userId,
          email: refreshPayload.email,
          role: refreshPayload.role,
        },
        JWT_SECRET,
        '15m'
      );

      const response = NextResponse.next({
        request: {
          headers: requestHeaders,
        },
      });

      setSecureCookie(response, AUTH_COOKIE_NAME, newAuthToken, 15 * 60);

      requestHeaders.set('x-user-id', refreshPayload.userId);
      requestHeaders.set('x-user-email', refreshPayload.email);
      if (refreshPayload.role) {
        requestHeaders.set('x-user-role', refreshPayload.role);
      }
      requestHeaders.set('x-token-refreshed', 'true');

      response.headers.set('x-middleware-cache', 'no-cache');
      
      return response;
    } else {
      const loginUrl = new URL('/login', request.url);
      loginUrl.searchParams.set('redirect', pathname);
      loginUrl.searchParams.set('session', 'expired');
      
      const response = NextResponse.redirect(loginUrl);
      deleteCookie(response, AUTH_COOKIE_NAME);
      deleteCookie(response, REFRESH_COOKIE_NAME);
      
      response.headers.set('x-middleware-cache', 'no-cache');
      response.headers.set('Cache-Control', 'no-store, must-revalidate');
      
      return response;
    }
  }

  if (!payload) {
    const loginUrl = new URL('/login', request.url);
    loginUrl.searchParams.set('redirect', pathname);
    loginUrl.searchParams.set('session', 'invalid');
    
    const response = NextResponse.redirect(loginUrl);
    deleteCookie(response, AUTH_COOKIE_NAME);
    deleteCookie(response, REFRESH_COOKIE_NAME);
    
    response.headers.set('x-middleware-cache', 'no-cache');
    response.headers.set('Cache-Control', 'no-store, must-revalidate');
    
    return response;
  }

  requestHeaders.set('x-user-id', payload.userId);
  requestHeaders.set('x-user-email', payload.email);
  if (payload.role) {
    requestHeaders.set('x-user-role', payload.role);
  }
  requestHeaders.set('x-authenticated', 'true');

  const response = NextResponse.next({
    request: {
      headers: requestHeaders,
    },
  });

  response.headers.set('X-Content-Type-Options', 'nosniff');
  response.headers.set('X-Frame-Options', 'DENY');
  response.headers.set('X-XSS-Protection', '1; mode=block');
  response.headers.set('Referrer-Policy', 'strict-origin-when-cross-origin');
  response.headers.set(
    'Permissions-Policy',
    'camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()'
  );

  if (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production') {
    response.headers.set(
      'Strict-Transport-Security',
      'max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload'
    );
  }

  return response;
}

export const config = {
  matcher: [
    '/((?!_next/static|_next/image|favicon.ico|.*\\.(?:svg|png|jpg|jpeg|gif|webp)$).*)',
  ],
};
